limitations: ai_investment_intensity: Quanta is a services/infrastructure contractor — AI investment is discussed as customer-driven demand for Quanta's services, not as Quanta's own AI capex; no dollar amounts or quantified AI-specific spend by Quanta disclosed in excerpts

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named use cases (data center electrical infrastructure, modular solutions) are described as market opportunities and positioning claims rather than deployed production outcomes with metrics; score reflects named initiatives without quantified results

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present; AI risk is narrowly scoped to cybersecurity threat-actor use of AI tools — no broader AI operational, regulatory, or model-risk discussion found in excerpts
